message:
feat(conformance): add termios_ops conformance executors (bd-p838)

Add conformance test executors for 5 termios functions:
- tcgetattr: handles valid/invalid fd, returns 0_OR_ENOTTY
- cfgetispeed: extracts input baud rate (B9600, B115200)
- cfgetospeed: extracts output baud rate
- cfsetispeed: sets input baud rate, returns 0 on success
- cfsetospeed: sets output baud rate, returns 0 on success

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
